category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a tool for collecting vulnerability data from various sources; official anchore/vunnel repository is for that vulnerability-data collection tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vunnel; official anchore/vunnel repository uses the Vunnel project name.
docs_sources: Official anchore/vunnel README is the primary project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points to the official anchore/vunnel GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies vulnerability data collection; source_facts.homepage identifies Anchore as the official project owner.
